'''Flashships''' were rare [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] built by the [[Korlier Combine]].

Though they were very fast, Flashships were built primarily for space combat. Just like all Korlier designs, they had no serial numbers, which made them hard to track and identify.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
